chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3424 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For katcha peshi. 11-01-2018 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro Additional A.G. Sindh along with DSP Muhammad Umer Shahani SDPO Johi and SIP Sher Khan Jamali SHO Gaji Shah. Respondents No.6 to 8 are present in person. This is second call. None present on behalf of petitioner. No intimation received. It is now 11.25 a.m. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 05.12.2017. Today learned A.A.G. files statement on behalf of respondents No.3 to 5 along with certain documents, which is taken on record, wherein they have stated that neither they have harassed the petitioner nor they intend to harass them. From perusal of petition, it reveals that the main grievance of the petitioner is that the petitioner is being harassed by the official respondents at the behest of private respondents. As observed above, official respondents through written comments have denied this fact. Perusal of memo of petition also appears that the dispute arise in between the parties appears to be of civil nature, therefore, this petition is dismissed. However, official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
